nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 白喉弯嘴鹛
nodes.summary: 白喉弯嘴鹛（Hall's babbler，学名 Pomatostomus halli），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Hall's babbler (Pomatostomus halli) is a small species of bird in the family Pomatostomidae most commonly found in dry Acacia scrubland in interior regions of eastern Australia.Higgins, P., & Peter, J

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: *Commonwealth status: not listed *State of New South Wales: vulnerable *State of Queensland: least concern Threats include habitat loss through clearing, habitat degradation through pastoralism and potentially predation by foxes and cats. Recovery recommendations include: *Reduce stock intensity or exclude grazing in some areas to allow vegetation to recover *Retention of grasslands, including the full cycle of grass development such as seed set and tussock formation *Retention of understory shrubs continuing to complete their life cycle *Prevent the clearing of habitat *Control foxes, feral cats, rabbits and feral goats
